name: automad
tagline: A flat-file content management system for building fast websites
description: Automad is a flat-file content management system that doesn’t require a database. It’s fast, easy to use, and features a template system and web-based admin panel for building websites.

features.title: Flat-File Content Management
features.description: Manage website content using Markdown files

features.title: Visual Content Editor
features.description: Edit pages visually without touching raw files

features.title: Page Templates
features.description: Control site structure using reusable templates

features.title: Media Management
features.description: Upload and organize images and media files

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Host the CMS on your own web server
